narrative:
Palmer Twp. township has 795 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.0 percentage points.
